message:
fix(bd-j5z1): switch rich_rust to crates.io 0.1.1 (remove local path)

Same pattern as bd-2do7 (asupersync). The local path dependency
blocks publishability and clean builds from fresh clones. The crate
is already published at the same version on crates.io.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
